mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM logistics_order WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0
AND tenant_id = ${@nova.erp.framework.tenant.core.context.TenantContextHolder@getTenantId()}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.product_id) FROM erp_stock s INNER JOIN erp_product p ON s.product_id = p.id AND p.deleted = 0 WHERE s.count < IFNULL(p.safe_stock, 10) AND s.deleted = 0
AND s.tenant_id = ${@nova.erp.framework.tenant.core.context.TenantContextHolder@getTenantId()}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.product_id) FROM erp_stock s INNER JOIN erp_product p ON s.product_id = p.id AND p.deleted = 0 WHERE s.count >= IFNULL(p.safe_stock, 10) AND s.count > 0 AND s.deleted = 0
AND s.tenant_id = ${@nova.erp.framework.tenant.core.context.TenantContextHolder@getTenantId()}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.product_id) FROM erp_stock s INNER JOIN erp_product p ON s.product_id = p.id AND p.deleted = 0 WHERE s.count > 0 AND s.count < IFNULL(p.safe_stock, 10) AND s.deleted = 0
AND s.tenant_id = ${@nova.erp.framework.tenant.core.context.TenantContextHolder@getTenantId()}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.product_id) FROM erp_stock s INNER JOIN erp_product p ON s.product_id = p.id AND p.deleted = 0 WHERE s.count <= 0 AND s.deleted = 0
AND s.tenant_id = ${@nova.erp.framework.tenant.core.context.TenantContextHolder@getTenantId()}
